sections.title: Current Work
sections.body: Dashboard v1 is live, embedded in Tela Hub, and syncing from the public-safe Notion source page.

sections.title: Next Step
sections.body: Maintain dashboard text and status by editing this JSON block; the Air sync job publishes changes automatically.

sections.title: Backend State
sections.body: The sync job runs on the Air every 10 seconds, writes config.json when changed, and pushes to GitHub Pages. No secrets, tokens, private machine details, protected endpoints, or real controls are included.
